case_title: BRADLEY, TERRY vs. JAHAN CORPORATION DBA MIDNITE CAFE

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRADLEY, TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT JAHAN CORPORATION DBA MIDNITE CAFE
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-13-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
NOTICE OF REPRESENTATION OF RESPONDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRADLEY, TERRY

#1 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST 11:40 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL MILES LOCKER, COUNSEL ROBERT DAUPHIN PRESENT FOR DEFT. A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO RECEIVE $550.00 FROM DEFT NO LATER THAN 9-20-93. FAILURE TO PAY DEFT ALSO TO PAY $600.00 ATTY FEES, IF DEFT COMPLIES COSTS AND ATTY FEES ARE WAIVED. PARTIES AGREE TO A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ANY AND ALL CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. PLTF WILL PREPARE STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE COURT TRIAL OF JUL-13-1993 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
